useJson.description: Whether to use JSON to build the claims

audience.description: Identifies the recipients that the JWT is intended for

expiresIn.description: The lifetime of the token in seconds

issuer.description: Identifies the principal that issued the JWT

notBefore.description: The time before which the JWT must not be accepted for processing

subject.description: Identifies the principal that is the subject of the JWT

claimsJson.description: Claims to add to the token in JSON format

token.description: The token to verify or decode

complete.description: Whether to return the complete decoded token with information about the header and signature or just the payload

ignoreExpiration.description: Whether to ignore the expiration of the token

ignoreNotBefore.description: Whether to ignore the not before claim of the token

clockTolerance.description: Number of seconds to tolerate when checking the nbf and exp claims, to deal with small clock differences among different servers

kid.description: The kid (key ID) claim is an optional header claim, used to specify the key for validating the signature

algorithm.description: The algorithm to use for signing or verifying the token, overrides algorithm in credentials
